title: Goldilocks and the Three Bears

segments.text: A little girl named Goldilocks walked into a house in the forest.
On the table were three bowls of porridge.
Then she sat in three chairs.
Tired, she went upstairs and lay on three beds.

transcript: A little girl named Goldilocks walked into a house in the forest. On the table were three bowls of porridge. She tasted them. One was too hot. One was too cold. One was just right. She ate it all up. Then she sat in three chairs. One was too big. One was too small. One was just right. But it broke! Tired, she went upstairs and lay on three beds. One was too hard. One was too soft. One was just right. She fell asleep. Then the bears came home!
